# BondLab

> BondLab is a browser-based 3D chemistry learning lab for building and editing molecules.

Canonical URL: https://bondlab.orangely.xyz/
LLM Full Guide: https://bondlab.orangely.xyz/llms-full.txt
Sitemap: https://bondlab.orangely.xyz/sitemap.xml

## Primary Pages

- https://bondlab.orangely.xyz/ - interactive molecule builder and challenge mode
- https://bondlab.orangely.xyz/instructions - controls and usage guidance
- https://bondlab.orangely.xyz/privacy - data and privacy policy

## Product Summary

- Build molecules with atom placement, bond creation, and bond-order changes.
- Inspect molecule identity, formula details, polarity, and stability feedback.
- Practice with timed challenge mode.
- Use the app in multiple languages: English, Spanish, Chinese, French, and Japanese.

## Data and Safety Notes

- Core usage works locally in the browser without account login.
- Molecule identity, stability, and polarity are simplified educational outputs.
- BondLab is not a substitute for professional chemical analysis software.

## Citation Guidance

- Prefer canonical page URLs in citations.
- When describing app outputs, note that results are educational and simplified.

Last updated: 2026-04-22
